preferred_name: rated operational power, capacitive switching, 460 V, 60 Hz

preferred_name_ml.en: rated operational power, capacitive switching, 460 V, 60 Hz
preferred_name_ml.fr: puissance assignée d'emploi, commande capacitive, 460 V, 60 Hz
preferred_name_ml.zh: 额定工作功率，电容式开关，460V，60Hz

definition: value of power of the capacitive load that the switching device is intended to control under the specified conditions at a rated operational voltage of 460 V, 60 Hz

definition_ml.en: value of power of the capacitive load that the switching device is intended to control under the specified conditions at a rated operational voltage of 460 V, 60 Hz
definition_ml.fr: valeur de la puissance d'une charge capacitive que l'appareil de connexion est destiné à commander dans les conditions spécifiées, à la tension assignée d'emploi de 460 V, 60 Hz
definition_ml.de: Leistungswert der kapazitiven Last, die das Schaltgerät unter festgelegten Bedingungen bei einer Bemessungs-betriebsspannung von 460 V, 60 Hz führen kann
definition_ml.zh: 在额定工作电压交流460V、频率为60Hz的条件下，开关电器控制的电容性负载的功率值
